title: Sidecar Panel Shift
prompt:
Create a production-ready Sidecar Panel Shift using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original transition switches a compact work summary between Draft and Reviewed. The active panel slides into a stable white frame while a narrow coral sidecar moves to the corresponding edge, so direction is visible without creating a dramatic full-page transition. Each state must have short, readable content and a written live update. Use a light Bento composition with #F4F5F6 stage, white card, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F support copy. Coral is the only bright accent, and cards must never use gradients.

Use two native buttons in a labelled group with aria-pressed and an aria-live polite status. Click, Enter, and Space select either state. Animate the content with a spring using stiffness 290 and damping 28, move the sidecar using the same spring, and fade copy over 160ms ease-out. Use local deterministic state only: no timers, random values, storage, remote data, network requests, browser globals, or fixed page positioning.

At 320px, buttons must remain 44px and labels must not truncate; at detail size, the panel may use a comfortable wider maximum width. Preserve logical keyboard order, visible 3px focus rings, AA contrast, and text that identifies the current state without relying on coral. Honor prefers-reduced-motion by swapping immediately with a 120ms opacity fade. Return complete client code, pure CSS approximation, and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML: <section class="sidecar-shift" data-state="draft"><button aria-pressed="true">Draft</button></section> */
.sidecar-shift{position:relative;max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#f4f5f6}.sidecar-shift::before{position:absolute;inset:0 auto 0 0;width:8px;background:#ff9950;content:""}.sidecar-shift[data-state=reviewed]::before{right:0;left:auto}.sidecar-shift button{min-height:44px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;font-weight:800}.sidecar-shift button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.sidecar-shift *{transition:none}}
